subcodes.first_line: O Sovereign of the monarchs of the world! Night and day their desire hath been to conquer lands and seize dominion, but to what end [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهریار تاجداران عالم شب و روز مرادشان کشورگشاای و گیتی ستانی اما چه فائده
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @material and spiritual existence; two books
